opportunities.title: Arcana Unleashed's New Backgrounds: The One Trait That Breaks Ritual Casting RAW
opportunities.why_now: EN World just previewed the arcane faction backgrounds, giving GMs fresh (and exploitable) material days before it hits tables.
opportunities.angle: 60-sec rules-ruling short: read the new background trait verbatim, then show exactly how it collides with 5e's ritual-casting rule and how you'd adjudicate it at your table.

opportunities.title: Sly Flourish's New Crowdfund: The Lazy-DM Trick Hiding in the Stretch Goals
opportunities.why_now: Sly Flourish just landed in EN World's weekly crowdfunding roundup, a name every 5e table already trusts.
opportunities.angle: Quick 'steal this ruling' short pulling one concrete prep-time-saving technique from the pledge tiers and showing how to run it cold at the table.

opportunities.title: Deathbringer's Undead: Why Turn Resistance Still Won't Save Your Cleric
opportunities.why_now: Deathbringer just surfaced in this week's crowdfunding news with new undead content ripe for a tactics breakdown.
opportunities.angle: Creature-tactic short: dissect a Deathbringer undead stat block against RAW Turn Undead mechanics and show the GM-side counterplay.

opportunities.title: Archives of Nethys Is Getting Cut Loose — Back Up Your Rules Lookups Now
opportunities.why_now: Pathfinder just announced it's ending its relationship with Archives of Nethys, threatening a tool many GMs cross-reference mid-session.
opportunities.angle: PSA-style dry warning short: explain what's disappearing, why it matters even for D&D/Shadowdark/DCC tables that borrow PF material, and what to archive today.

opportunities.title: The One Session-Zero Line That Actually Filters Bad Players
opportunities.why_now: Gnome Stew's fresh Gnomecast episode on 'seeking good players' is generating GM chatter this week.
opportunities.angle: React-format short: state one concrete, enforceable session-zero clause (e.g., a hard rule on rules-lawyering death saves) as a veteran-GM ruling, not vague advice.
